hotel_name: Hampton Inn by Hilton Garden City Long Island

reviews.title: Lie
reviews.text:
There is no airport transfer available. 

There were also no meal coupons for breakfast.

reviews.title: Stinks
reviews.negatives:
Room 406 stunk of cigarette smoke.
No other rooms. Fan provided was useless

reviews.title: the location was pretty good to us.
reviews.text: i had a good time staying at Hampton Inn Garden City during my business trip. The room was ok, room size is big. The facility is a little bit old, but acceptable.
reviews.positives: front desk lady was very nice and the location was good to visit my customers. It also closes to the shopping area.

reviews.title: Would not stay here sgsin
reviews.negatives: Service was poor and assistance was also very poor

reviews.title: Thank you to the staff.
reviews.text: Especially moved by the hospitality of the owner. Thank you.

reviews.title: Nasty
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Property is DIRTY, the front desk staff very unwelcoming never acknowledged that I came to her at the desk. No greeting nothing straight face. The windows of the property so dirty you can’t see outside and no fresh area in this hotels window don’t open. Hallway desperately need a shampoo as well as the rooms. The black girl in at 7am very unwelcoming.

reviews.title: GOOD HOTEL...BUT
reviews.text: I BOOKED THIS HOTEL BECAUSE IT IS NEARBY JFK AIRPORT AND AS I READ THERE IS A FREE SHUTTL TO TERMINALS BUT THAT IS NOT TRUE...I PAID 50$ FOR UBER TO CATCH MY FLIGHT.

reviews.title: Not enough washcloths and towels..requested room cleaning, never cleaned
reviews.positives: Breakfast wasn’t enough for the amount of guests therefore food such as fruits were gone
reviews.negatives: More evaluations and preparation for amount of guests at breakfast

reviews.title: Lovely hotel with friendly staff far from airports
reviews.text: I arrived extremely distressed, having been misinformed by Agoda that the hotel was near JFK airport, which it isn't. Although I spent a fortune on taxis, the hotel was lovely: surprisingly big room for NY, within walking distance (though walking isn't easy as the hotel is near highways) from lots of shopping and dining including many discount stores. The Hampton chain is obviously a good one; details like apples in the lobby matter!
reviews.positives: Big room, good breakfast, friendly staff

reviews.title: Not what we wanted. Booking.com provided false information.
reviews.negatives: AC unit was loud and hummed when off. No restaurant/bar as we were told. Would not have chosen this hotel knowing there was no restaurant/bar on site. Very unhappy with booking.com. Will not use again.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Very nice staff, very welcoming and amazing service.

reviews.title: Horrible. Rude staff. Charged for parking
reviews.negatives: Staff was rude did not explain that you have tor request for your room to be cleaned. Charged for priming

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Rooms was clean and updated.   Nice loby.

reviews.title: Seriously worth it
reviews.text: Made a last minute reservation to attend a funeral out there.  The staff...Awesome they let us all check in to our rooms without the usually ridiculous check in time of 3 pm and they were so courteous.  Everything was clean and organized.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location was ok ,but the facilities need to be cleaner and free of roaches. Did made a complaint  no effort has been made to exterminated or clean  it for the 2 nights.
reviews.negatives: They should exterminate  and clean more often.

reviews.title: Very disappointing
reviews.positives: Breakfast was not outstanding but fairly acceptable.
reviews.negatives:
The hotel looks dilapidated and everything in the room is old. There is basically no place to put your clothing (only one closet for hanging. There is  very little old furniture in the room and you have an area totally open with nothing on it except one corner chair. For the price they are charging is absolutely over rated and will never stay there again or for that matter no other hilton in that range. The category of stars being nice in my comment is definitely a maximum of 2. 
We had to go down after returning and find out that there were no towels and the bed in total disarray and contacted the front desk and they said that is the way it is and had to go down to get new towels but they did not have all of them and only  the large one and the lilttle ones (the middle one was not available at the front desk. I already told all the people in our group and even the ones that live there never to use this hotel.

reviews.title: The room was great but the employees were terrible and I wasn’t the only person she was rude to that morning which is wh
reviews.positives: The room was very clean and comfortable no complaint at all with the room it was a 10
reviews.negatives: The front desk workers were very rude and unwilling to help make the trip worth coming back on my next trip.I work for DHHS in Maine and had to drive to New York to pick up 2 children that are in custody to bring home and instead of making the trip home after the drive I rented a room at your hotel for the night.When checking out I simply asked for a receipt so I could be reimbursed for the room (which is how we work) and the employee had a attitude and was very rude telling me she could give me a receipt but didn’t want to for some reason.After explaining why I needed a paper receipt she was very unprofessional and rude.I explained that I had read your policy and it clearly says if you want a receipt to ask for one at checkout 🤔 she then got loud and ignorant in front of the children I had picked up and although my business and future stays mean nothing to your employee I do reviews on all hotels and that alone was not ok by any means 😞 the lady on shift the morning of 11-24-2024 was a older African lady and if she doesn’t like dealing with customers she should find a new job.I mean how hard would it had been to get me a paper receipt of the cost to stay one night?One of my co workers had referred me to the Hilton from past stays she had made there and she had no problem getting a paper receipt at checkout so I don’t understand why she wouldn’t do the same for I

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel is excellent.
reviews.negatives:
I am very disappointed for the following;
- no room set up during my stay,
- toilet smells bad 
- very poor breakfast. Next day of my stay there were no fruits or juice.
- hot water for tea was warm.
- you hear your next room.

reviews.title: Decent place
reviews.positives: The facility was super clean and the hallways smelled amazing!
reviews.negatives: I was traveling for a medical procedure with my friend and her newborn. There were doors being slammed all night and day. We didn’t get much sleep because of the noise. I mentioned it at checkout and the lady brushed me off and said no one was slamming doors. It’s just their doors. That frustrated me a little because if you know your doors are that loud, fix them. The beds were also a little hard. The breakfast was amazing. Everyone except checkout was so friendly.

reviews.title: I was disappointed with the accommodation and the breakfast offering.
reviews.positives: The location is great with easy access to the mall and restaurants.
reviews.negatives: I was placed in Room 219 that was cold. The heat in the room was not working. I had to endure an entire day and night in a cold room.

reviews.title: Would not stay here again. Very disappointed.

reviews.negatives: The business center was not operating making my work very inconvenient.

reviews.title: We were in the room for 3 nights with no towel or garbage service.  Very noisy in the late night hou

reviews.title: Definitely not worth the price . Maybe a third of the cost be overpriced in my personal opinion.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I didn't like the woman who checked me in. I came in from upstate NY to attend a funeral and she was snappy with me about an early check in which I clearly stated on Booking.com that I needed an early check-in.  Also when I offered her my confirmation number she very rudely told that she did not need it. I was very upset at the way she treated me. Also when did you have to pay for parking?? I'm staying at your hotel with a parking lot no need to pay for parking!!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Check in staff person made a point to show me they did not welcome me. Very unkind. For that reason I would not want to return. There was one nice staff member I encountered throughout my stay. But especially the first day at check in this person and the person next to him gave me a look then had the person next to him help me pretty much gave me attitude and ignored me. Then it was strangely noisy my first night from 11.30pm until 1.30 or 2am nonstop. Could not sleep.

reviews.title: When you spend over $200 a night, you expect to get better accommodations and service
reviews.positives: Room was comfortable, not the cleanest and we were unable to get fresh towels because housekeeping wasn't available. We also was not able to get garbage bags. There was a really nice front desk rep. who tried his hardest to keep everything in check but he was alone and seemed to be the only one working the weekend.
reviews.negatives:
customer service
housekeeping services
cleanliness of the room

reviews.title: You get what you pay for
reviews.positives: The front desk staff member, Crystal, was always polite and eager to assist. She deserves some recognition from the Hampton Inn for her stellar hospitality and professionalism.
reviews.negatives: I didn't realize that daily housekeeping was not the norm. We had this rectified on Day 2.  The fact that the hotel was testing the fire system meant that the fire alarm was going off daily during the five days. It meant that we stayed out more than we stayed in the hotel due to the annoying sound of the fire alarm system.  We did receive a letter upon arrival that this would take place; however, we did not realize it would be a daily annoyance.

reviews.title: Great except for front desk staff
reviews.positives: The breakfast was good
reviews.negatives: Even though we paid cash, they charged my credit card

reviews.title: Disappointed.
reviews.positives: Location. Bed are comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
I used to stay here often since I moved. Although the location is convenient, I stopped because of the noise level. This 2 night stay reminded me of why I stopped staying here. The rooms are dark so yeah, please update the lights. 
But it’s the noise that has always been a concern. 
I believe when you are checking guests in after a certain hour, say 10 pm, there should be a way to remind the guest that others may be relaxing or sleeping. A wedding party checked in and stood/sat outside of my 2 room for hours, opening and closing many doors, and treating the shared hallway like a lobby lounge. Considering other hotel options once again for my next trip.

reviews.title: Won't be staying here again.
reviews.positives: The bed and pillows were very comfortable.  The room was clean.
reviews.negatives: There was a loud intermittent popping/thumping noise throughout the night. Sometimes it sounded like it was right in our room. Other times it sounded like it was next door or above us and other times you could hear it down the hall. Maybe it was the pipes or the HVAC. I don't know, but it was loud and it went through the whole night. Terrible night's sleep. We actually left after one night when we had planned to stay 2 nights.

reviews.title: The first night was great,breakfast was delicious,second night wasn’t pleasant at all,room dirty.
reviews.positives: Breakfast,clean room
reviews.negatives: Toilet clog,ask front desk to have room clean next day,and it wasn’t.That was very disappointing especially when the front desk said they would let the cleaning crew be aware,but room was still dirty.I had to ask front desk for towels and wash clothes.

reviews.title: Clean spacious rooms in a very affordable price. Great for families.
reviews.positives: Check in was very easy. The room was very spacious and clean. The hotel seemed to be updated and in good condition.

reviews.title: A great stay marred by a distasteful upcharge.
reviews.positives: Over all the hotel was clean and modern, and the room was spacious and well appointed.
reviews.negatives:
I really had no issues at all with the hotel or my room, so I cannot offer any recommendations on that.  The staff were all friendly and professional, from the front desk to housekeeping.

On the other hand, I strongly disliked the $10 parking fee.  I have paid it in urban hotels, but in the suburbs no one is walking or taking public transit to arrive.  I’d rather you just raise the rates of the rooms by $10.  It would be more honest.  Instead they ask or inform me at check in as if I have a choice to refuse.  It’s insulting to offer the illusion of choice when in practical terms there isn’t one.  It’s no different than a “convenience charge” which is convenient for the business who is collecting it, but not the consumer who pays it.  It left a sour taste after what was an otherwise excellent stay.

reviews.title: I would stay again

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Great lobby area with a nice helpful representative present at front desk all the time. 
Lots of space in lobby, tv, decent breakfast area. Enough space and sitting room for everything! 
Good breakfast, also convenient hours of breakfast: 6am to 10am. 
Hot water and tea 24x7 in the lobby 
Pool is perfect and warm! 
Room is clean, bathroom has everything: shampoo, conditioner and lotion. All in big bottles attached to the wall, not a one time thing. 
I didn’t request a first floor room upon the booking but it was available when we arrived (disability friendly). 
Time of check out - 12pm! Very convenient.
reviews.negatives:
It’s nothing major to be honest. But: 
Pool didn’t have towels
Lobby didn’t have a laundry soap for sale. 
I couldn’t find a vending machine, however, lobby area had a few things for sale (soda, candies), so it’s not really an issue. 
Parking is $10 a day, which is fine, but could be free =)))
Overall hotel is great but room seemed a bit outdated. Tv was definitely “old school”, couldn’t find connection to Netflix or showtime (advertised in online “Hilton honors” thing). Again, it’s not an issue at all, just a small observation. I will definitely book it again if needed!

reviews.title: Refreshing and true relaxation..
reviews.positives:
The Staff Are incredible ,  Christina , at the Concierge Desk Is Phenomenal .    Easy Check in ,  She was beyond helpful. 
   And Rosiland in Guest Services Was Great .!  
   She was  Warm and Friendly, even and helped me So I was able To leave a tip for the Woman taking care of breakfast.. 
   More Importantly...  I Left a Pair of Ray ban Sunglasses accidentally in the room , And Didn't realize until I was in Another State ..   Again Christina Came to the Rescue With the Housekeeping staff And Found them and was offering the Send them to Me ..  "honestly Who does that anymore"...   But I Told Her that I'll be back on  May 18th for the Long Island Spring Dust-off/ Car show, And I know where We will be Staying .. 
             P.Farrelly

reviews.negatives: There was a strong smell of fabuloso in the hallway and a distinct smell in the hotel room that was also strong. It gave me a headache but we left and came back and it didn’t bother me anymore. One night of that was okay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Clean,comfortable, very friendly staff. Breakfast included scrambled eggs, hard boiled eggs, sausages,potatoes, bread,bagels,make ur own waffles,oatmeal,and fruit. Tasted good.
reviews.negatives: Scrambled eggs

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Close to nice stores and available parking without fees.
reviews.negatives: Room was small for the price.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Family staff, clean rooms, good breakfast
reviews.negatives: Was a bit surprised with the amount that we spent just for the rooms which was fine but then the charges for parking each day just to park at the hotel where you stay. Maybe it's a New York City thing or a Long Island thing, but I have never had to do that before

reviews.title: It was a nice stay. Pool is excellent and beds are comfy. My room was very spacious and clean.
reviews.positives: Good.
reviews.negatives: Parking should be free.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The staff were very pleasant and helpful. Everything was clean and tidy. I liked the coffee offered all day and the water located in the lobby.
reviews.negatives: Whatever cleaner or air freshening product used was not a pleasant smell I thought having a $10 dollar a day parking fee was a bit much.  It's Long Island , not NYC.

reviews.title: It’s a cheap stay. It’s okay for the price but I expected better via booking.com pictures

reviews.title: My hotel room was great. It was clean.
reviews.positives: I like my room. It was comfortable and silent.
reviews.negatives: No comment.

reviews.title: Very clean. Great location. Friendly helpful staff! Daniel was amazingly helpful!
reviews.positives: Daniel at the front desk was extremely helpful. He also accommodated a low level for me.
reviews.negatives: I had a second floor which I loved. But, my room had a door to get to room next door. They were having a party or something and their guests kept opening the door on their side then closing it. I can hear them all and it appeared as if they thought it were the bathroom on their side. Next visit I’ll ask not to have a room with the door to next room.

reviews.title: The property was nice and the location was good.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was just ok

reviews.title: Very satisfying.
reviews.positives: The location was perfect for our activities, staff was extremely courteous and helpful. The room was clean, comfortable & nicely appointed. I would definitely stay here again & recommend to others.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was mediocre and pretty much the same every day. A little more variety and higher quality would be welcome.

reviews.title: I had a great stay. The room was quiet and clean.
reviews.positives: I really liked the room I stayed in. It was quiet.
reviews.negatives: No comment.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Cleanliness of facilities and quality of fitness room equipment.
reviews.negatives: Room price, lack of sugar-free condiments (such as syrup) at breakfast buffet.

reviews.title: Friendsgiving trip
reviews.positives: Everyone was friendly from check-in to check out. The location was perfect for everything we needed.   The room was very clean.  I usually clean my room when I check in to a hotel, and when I dish this here no dust or dirt was noted on my cleaning rag.
reviews.negatives: N/a

reviews.title: Older hotel in need of an update, but great staff
reviews.positives: Staff was super friendly.  Everyone there was great.  Location was good, lots of places nearby to get food and drink.  Grateful they let me check in early, as I had to change and get to a meeting.  Wifi was strong enough to hold Zoom calls.
reviews.negatives: Hotel really needs an update.  Room was very dark.  You could hear the people in the room above walking.  Bathroom old.  Lobby has been renovated, but rooms are very old-school.

reviews.title: Easy location.  Clean & Comfy.  Good Value.  No frills
reviews.positives: Good Value.  Really clean.   Nice staff.  Very quiet even on a weekend night.
reviews.negatives: Older property.   Large room could use a 3nd chair or couch.  Hvac a little noisy

reviews.title: Overall, a good stay, however, some shortcomings.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was good and very nicely presented. My room wasn’t cleaned every day, and I wasn’t given fresh towels every day, which I expected.
reviews.negatives: Clean towels, bed, straightening, and trash taken out every day is what I normally expect. The service was not provided by your hotel.

reviews.title: Clean as a whistle.
reviews.positives:
Clean as could be. The hotel was immaculate. The pillows are plush. The breakfast was decent but not amazing.

The bathroom was spotless, and they actually had bathroom fans, which too many cheaper hotels scrimp on.
reviews.negatives: I need a plusher mattress, but I also have a bad hip so I’m extremely picky.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Very conveniently located. Clean and friendly. 
A bit dated, but all amenities you could want.
reviews.negatives:
We had an issue with the lock on our door. RM 303
We returned to find the door ajar. Everything was fine, but the door seems to spontaneously flip the lock and not allow it to close properly. This seemed to have been a previous issue also as the door was ‘dug out’ around the lock. Needless to say while all was well, it was disconcerting.

reviews.title: It was great. Great staff.
reviews.positives: I really liked the room. It was comfortable and quiet. I slept really well.

reviews.title: All good except for breakfast
reviews.positives: Facilities were clean and staff friendly
reviews.negatives: Ran out of several items at breakfast

reviews.title: It was for a wedding
reviews.positives: Clean and in a central location
reviews.negatives: The hotel did not have a brochure or anything on places to eat in the room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Location, cleanliness, spacious and had a clean pool

reviews.title: Clean and Comfortable with Friendly Staff
reviews.positives:
All the staff were very friendly. They greeted us with a smile and a warm hello. Also, I like that there was a nice breakfast area to sit and eat the hot breakfast.
My bedroom suite was a nice size, clean and with comfortable beds. I like that there was a tub to relax in. Many hotels now only have showers.
reviews.negatives: Although I had a room upgrade, I didn't like the view of the roof. Also, there was rust on the bathroom grab bar.

reviews.title: I felt very safe and staff were all accommodating.
reviews.positives: The staff was very friendly.  Breakfast was great.

reviews.title: great location

reviews.title: All in all, my girlfriend and I enjoy the hotel so much.
reviews.positives: everyone is so friendly.
reviews.negatives: the only thing that was bad was the fact that we had to switch rooms because the beds smelled like urine in the original room we were in.
